requirement_topic.en: IRAM Product Certification — Mandatory for Listed Motor Categories
requirement_topic.zh: IRAM产品认证——列名电机类别强制要求
requirement_topic.zht: IRAM產品認證——列名電機類別強制要求

summary.en: IRAM (Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación) issues mandatory product certification for industrial electric motor categories listed under Argentine regulations. IRAM 62404 aligns with IEC 60034 and governs efficiency and safety certification. For listed categories, the Certificado de Homologación or equivalent IRAM product certificate is required before the motor can be legally imported or sold in Argentina. INTI laboratories provide testing and conformity assessment services to support IRAM certification. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is not recognised as equivalent to IRAM certification.
summary.zh: IRAM（阿根廷标准化与认证协会）对阿根廷法规列名的工业电机类别颁发强制产品认证。IRAM 62404与IEC 60034对齐，规范效率和安全认证。对于列名类别，须持有Certificado de Homologación或等效IRAM产品证书，方可在阿根廷合法进口或销售电机。INTI实验室提供检测和合规评定服务，支持IRAM认证。CCC（中国强制认证）不被认可为IRAM认证的等效凭证。
summary.zht: IRAM（阿根廷標準化與認證協會）對阿根廷法規列名的工業電機類別頒發強制產品認證。IRAM 62404與IEC 60034對齊，規範效率和安全認證。對於列名類別，須持有Certificado de Homologación或等效IRAM產品證書，方可在阿根廷合法進口或銷售電機。INTI實驗室提供檢測和合規評定服務，支持IRAM認證。CCC（中國強制認證）不被認可為IRAM認證的等效憑證。

standards_or_laws: Certificado de Homologación (required for listed motor categories)
INTI — testing and conformity assessment for IRAM certification

summary.en: In China, CCC (China Compulsory Certification, 3C认证) is the primary mandatory product certification mark administered by CNCA. However, CCC is not required for most general industrial three-phase AC motors (they are generally exempt from the CCC compulsory catalogue). Chinese motors are certified against GB 18613-2020 (efficiency) and GB 755-2019 (ratings/performance) for domestic market compliance. Neither CCC nor GB certification is recognised as equivalent to IRAM certification for Argentine market access.
summary.zh: 在中国，CCC（中国强制认证，3C认证）是CNCA管理的主要强制产品认证标志。但大多数一般工业三相交流电机不要求CCC认证（通常豁免于CCC强制认证目录）。中国电机通过GB 18613-2020（效率）和GB 755-2019（额定值/性能）认证以满足国内市场合规要求。无论是CCC还是GB认证，均不被认可为进入阿根廷市场的IRAM认证等效凭证。
summary.zht: 在中國，CCC（中國強制認證，3C認證）是CNCA管理的主要強制產品認證標誌。但大多數一般工業三相交流電機不要求CCC認證（通常豁免於CCC強制認證目錄）。中國電機通過GB 18613-2020（效率）和GB 755-2019（額定值/性能）認證以滿足國內市場合規要求。無論是CCC還是GB認證，均不被認可為進入阿根廷市場的IRAM認證等效憑證。

standards_or_laws: CCC (3C) — not required for most general industrial three-phase motors; not recognised by IRAM

gap.en: The certification gap is significant: Chinese motors sold domestically without CCC (which is typical for general industrial motors) have no mandatory pre-market product certification equivalent to IRAM. Even if a motor has CCC, it is not recognised in Argentina. Argentine market entry requires obtaining IRAM product certification from IRAM or a Certificado de Homologación, supported by INTI testing. This is a process and cost gap that must be planned into the export timeline; there is no fast-track mutual recognition between China and Argentina for motor certification.
gap.zh: 认证差距显著：在中国，通常没有CCC的一般工业电机在国内销售无需等同于IRAM的强制上市前产品认证。即使电机持有CCC，在阿根廷也不被认可。进入阿根廷市场需要从IRAM获得IRAM产品认证或Certificado de Homologación，并由INTI检测支持。这是必须纳入出口时间表的流程和成本差距；中国和阿根廷之间对电机认证没有快速互认机制。
gap.zht: 認證差距顯著：在中國，通常沒有CCC的一般工業電機在國內銷售無需等同於IRAM的強制上市前產品認證。即使電機持有CCC，在阿根廷也不被認可。進入阿根廷市場需要從IRAM獲得IRAM產品認證或Certificado de Homologación，並由INTI檢測支持。這是必須納入出口時間表的流程和成本差距；中國和阿根廷之間對電機認證沒有快速互認機制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IRAM certification (or Certificado de Homologación) required for listed motor categories before Argentine market entry
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandatory for most general industrial motors (CCC catalogue exemption); domestic compliance via GB 18613-2020 and GB 755-2019

source.publisher: IRAM — Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor manufacturers exporting to Argentina must obtain IRAM product certification or a Certificado de Homologación before shipment for listed motor categories. CCC and GB certifications are not recognised as equivalent. INTI testing is the standard conformity assessment pathway supporting IRAM certification. Engaging an IRAM-authorised representative or local Argentine importer with certification experience is strongly advisable. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向阿根廷出口的中国电机制造商，对于列名电机类别，须在发货前获得IRAM产品认证或Certificado de Homologación。CCC和GB认证不被认可为等效凭证。INTI检测是支持IRAM认证的标准合规评定路径。强烈建议委托IRAM授权代表或具有认证经验的本地阿根廷进口商。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向阿根廷出口的中國電機製造商，對於列名電機類別，須在發貨前獲得IRAM產品認證或Certificado de Homologación。CCC和GB認證不被認可為等效憑證。INTI檢測是支持IRAM認證的標準合規評定路徑。強烈建議委託IRAM授權代表或具有認證經驗的本地阿根廷進口商。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。

requirement_topic.en: ARCA (ex-AFIP) Import Customs and Documentation Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: ARCA（原AFIP）进口海关及文件要求
requirement_topic.zht: ARCA（原AFIP）進口海關及文件要求

summary.en: ARCA (Administración de Recursos de la Seguridad Argentina, formerly AFIP) is the Argentine customs and tax authority responsible for import documentation and clearance. Industrial motors imported into Argentina must be accompanied by documentation demonstrating IRAM certification (or Certificado de Homologación) and energy efficiency label compliance. Import duty and tariff classification under the Argentine customs code apply; HS code classification should be verified for the specific motor type. ARCA may require a Licencia Automática de Importación (LAI) or other import permit depending on the product category and trade policy in effect at the time of shipment.
summary.zh: ARCA（阿根廷安全资源管理局，原AFIP）是负责进口文件和清关的阿根廷海关及税务机构。进口阿根廷的工业电机须附有证明IRAM认证（或Certificado de Homologación）和能效标识合规的文件。阿根廷海关编码下的进口关税和关税分类适用；应按具体电机类型核实HS编码分类。ARCA可能要求Licencia Automática de Importación（LAI）或其他进口许可，取决于发货时有效的产品类别和贸易政策。
summary.zht: ARCA（阿根廷安全資源管理局，原AFIP）是負責進口文件和清關的阿根廷海關及稅務機構。進口阿根廷的工業電機須附有證明IRAM認證（或Certificado de Homologación）和能效標識合規的文件。阿根廷海關編碼下的進口關稅和關稅分類適用；應按具體電機類型核實HS編碼分類。ARCA可能要求Licencia Automática de Importación（LAI）或其他進口許可，取決於發貨時有效的產品類別和貿易政策。

standards_or_laws: Licencia Automática de Importación (LAI) — may apply depending on product category and trade policy
Argentine customs HS code classification for electric motors

summary.en: China's customs export documentation for industrial motors follows standard HS code classification (HS 8501 for electric motors) with standard export declarations. No pre-export certification is required specifically for Argentine market compliance — the IRAM and energy efficiency obligations are fulfilled at the Argentine import stage. Chinese exporters must ensure that commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, and any required IRAM or energy efficiency conformity documents are prepared prior to shipment.
summary.zh: 中国工业电机出口海关文件遵循标准HS编码分类（电机HS 8501），并进行标准出口申报。没有专门针对阿根廷市场合规的出口前认证要求——IRAM和能效义务在阿根廷进口阶段履行。中国出口商须确保在发货前准备好商业发票、装箱单、原产地证书以及任何所需的IRAM或能效合规文件。
summary.zht: 中國工業電機出口海關文件遵循標準HS編碼分類（電機HS 8501），並進行標準出口申報。沒有專門針對阿根廷市場合規的出口前認證要求——IRAM和能效義務在阿根廷進口階段履行。中國出口商須確保在發貨前準備好商業發票、裝箱單、原產地證書以及任何所需的IRAM或能效合規文件。

standards_or_laws: Chinese export documentation requirements (commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin)

gap.en: The main customs gap is that Argentine import clearance requires IRAM certification documents and energy efficiency label compliance documentation — which most Chinese exporters without prior Argentine market experience will not have prepared. ARCA may also require an LAI or similar import permit that must be obtained in advance. Argentine trade policy can change by resolution, affecting import permit requirements; exporters should verify current ARCA requirements with an Argentine customs agent or trade law professional before shipment.
gap.zh: 主要海关差距在于：阿根廷进口清关要求IRAM认证文件和能效标识合规文件——对于没有阿根廷市场经验的中国出口商，这些通常尚未准备。ARCA也可能要求须提前获得的LAI或类似进口许可。阿根廷贸易政策可通过决议变动，影响进口许可要求；出口商应在发货前通过阿根廷海关代理或贸易法律专业人士核实当前ARCA要求。
gap.zht: 主要海關差距在於：阿根廷進口清關要求IRAM認證文件和能效標識合規文件——對於沒有阿根廷市場經驗的中國出口商，這些通常尚未準備。ARCA也可能要求須提前獲得的LAI或類似進口許可。阿根廷貿易政策可通過決議變動，影響進口許可要求；出口商應在發貨前通過阿根廷海關代理或貿易法律專業人士核實當前ARCA要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARCA customs documentation including IRAM certification evidence required for import clearance; LAI or import permit may also be required depending on current trade policy
mandatory_status.cn: Standard export documentation required; no pre-export certification specific to Argentine market compliance

source.publisher: ARCA — Administración de Recursos de la Seguridad Argentina (ex-AFIP)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentine customs import clearance requires IRAM certification documentation and energy efficiency label compliance evidence. Chinese exporters must prepare these documents prior to shipment and should verify current ARCA import permit requirements (LAI or other permits) with an Argentine customs agent. Argentine trade policy is subject to change by resolution; verify requirements close to the shipment date. This is informational only and does not constitute legal, customs, or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷海关进口清关要求IRAM认证文件和能效标识合规证据。中国出口商须在发货前准备这些文件，并应通过阿根廷海关代理核实当前ARCA进口许可要求（LAI或其他许可）。阿根廷贸易政策可通过决议变动；应在发货日期前核实要求。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律、海关或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷海關進口清關要求IRAM認證文件和能效標識合規證據。中國出口商須在發貨前準備這些文件，並應通過阿根廷海關代理核實當前ARCA進口許可要求（LAI或其他許可）。阿根廷貿易政策可通過決議變動；應在發貨日期前核實要求。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律、海關或認證建議。

requirement_topic.en: CCC Recognition and China-Argentina Mutual Recognition Status
requirement_topic.zh: CCC认可及中阿相互认可状态
requirement_topic.zht: CCC認可及中阿相互認可狀態

summary.en: Argentina does not recognise CCC (China Compulsory Certification) as equivalent to IRAM certification. There is no bilateral mutual recognition agreement (MRA) between China and Argentina covering industrial electric motor product certification as of the last verified date. Motors must be certified under the Argentine IRAM scheme regardless of any Chinese certification held. Argentine authorities (IRAM, INTI, ARCA) require Argentine-scheme conformity documentation; Chinese certification documents may be submitted as supporting technical evidence but do not substitute for IRAM certification.
summary.zh: 阿根廷不认可CCC（中国强制认证）为IRAM认证的等效凭证。截至最近核实日期，中国与阿根廷之间没有涵盖工业电机产品认证的双边相互认可协议（MRA）。无论持有何种中国认证，电机均须在阿根廷IRAM方案下取得认证。阿根廷主管机构（IRAM、INTI、ARCA）要求阿根廷方案的合规文件；中国认证文件可作为支持性技术证据提交，但不能替代IRAM认证。
summary.zht: 阿根廷不認可CCC（中國強制認證）為IRAM認證的等效憑證。截至最近核實日期，中國與阿根廷之間沒有涵蓋工業電機產品認證的雙邊相互認可協議（MRA）。無論持有何種中國認證，電機均須在阿根廷IRAM方案下取得認證。阿根廷主管機構（IRAM、INTI、ARCA）要求阿根廷方案的合規文件；中國認證文件可作為支持性技術證據提交，但不能替代IRAM認證。

standards_or_laws: IRAM certification scheme (no MRA with China as of verified date)
CCC (CNCA) — domestic China certification; not recognised in Argentina
No bilateral China-Argentina MRA for electric motor product certification (verified: false — confirm current status)

summary.en: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is China's mandatory pre-market product certification mark for listed product categories, administered by CNCA. For most general industrial three-phase AC motors, CCC is not required (exempt from the catalogue). Chinese motor manufacturers typically hold GB 18613-2020 compliance documentation and, where applicable, a CCC certificate. Neither of these is recognised as equivalent to Argentine IRAM certification. China has not concluded a bilateral mutual recognition agreement with Argentina specifically covering motor product certification.
summary.zh: CCC（中国强制认证）是中国CNCA管理的、针对列名产品类别的强制上市前产品认证标志。对于大多数一般工业三相交流电机，不要求CCC认证（豁免于目录）。中国电机制造商通常持有GB 18613-2020合规文件，及（如适用）CCC证书。这些均不被认可为阿根廷IRAM认证的等效凭证。中国与阿根廷之间尚未就电机产品认证签订双边相互认可协议。
summary.zht: CCC（中國強制認證）是中國CNCA管理的、針對列名產品類別的強制上市前產品認證標誌。對於大多數一般工業三相交流電機，不要求CCC認證（豁免於目錄）。中國電機製造商通常持有GB 18613-2020合規文件，及（如適用）CCC證書。這些均不被認可為阿根廷IRAM認證的等效憑證。中國與阿根廷之間尚未就電機產品認證簽訂雙邊相互認可協議。

standards_or_laws: CCC (CNCA) — not applicable to Argentine market; not recognised by IRAM
GB 18613-2020 compliance documentation — supporting technical evidence only, not a substitute for IRAM

gap.en: The absence of a China-Argentina MRA for motor certification means every Chinese motor exported to Argentina must go through the full IRAM certification process, regardless of existing Chinese certifications. This creates time and cost barriers, particularly for manufacturers without prior Argentine market experience. Chinese certification documents (GB 18613-2020 test reports, CCC certificates where held) may be submitted as supporting technical evidence to expedite INTI assessment, but cannot substitute for the formal IRAM certification decision.
gap.zh: 中阿之间缺乏电机认证互认协议，意味着每台出口阿根廷的中国电机必须完成完整的IRAM认证流程，与已持有的中国认证无关。这对没有阿根廷市场经验的制造商构成时间和成本障碍。中国认证文件（GB 18613-2020测试报告、持有的CCC证书）可作为支持性技术证据提交，以加快INTI评定，但不能替代正式的IRAM认证决定。
gap.zht: 中阿之間缺乏電機認證互認協議，意味著每台出口阿根廷的中國電機必須完成完整的IRAM認證流程，與已持有的中國認證無關。這對沒有阿根廷市場經驗的製造商構成時間和成本障礙。中國認證文件（GB 18613-2020測試報告、持有的CCC證書）可作為支持性技術證據提交，以加快INTI評定，但不能替代正式的IRAM認證決定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — full IRAM certification required; no MRA shortcut from Chinese certification; CCC not recognised
mandatory_status.cn: CCC not required for most general industrial motors; GB compliance documentation required for domestic market only

source.publisher: IRAM — Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No mutual recognition agreement exists between China and Argentina for electric motor product certification. Chinese exporters must obtain full IRAM certification regardless of CCC or GB compliance status. GB 18613-2020 test reports and other technical documentation may be submitted as supporting evidence for INTI assessment but do not replace the IRAM certification decision. Exporters should plan for certification lead time and cost. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国与阿根廷之间没有电机产品认证互认协议。中国出口商无论持有CCC还是GB合规状态，均须获得完整的IRAM认证。GB 18613-2020测试报告和其他技术文件可作为INTI评定的支持性证据提交，但不能取代IRAM认证决定。出口商应预留认证所需时间和成本。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國與阿根廷之間沒有電機產品認證互認協議。中國出口商無論持有CCC還是GB合規狀態，均須獲得完整的IRAM認證。GB 18613-2020測試報告和其他技術文件可作為INTI評定的支持性證據提交，但不能取代IRAM認證決定。出口商應預留認證所需時間和成本。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。
